{{Quote|There's something big going on up at the space station; they're calling it 'Operation: Elrood'.|[[Pter Venteck]]|<ref name="OE" />}}
'''Operation: Elrood''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military action designed at taking control of the entire [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], in addition to the interdicted space that lay between [[Planet/Legends|planets]] [[Derilyn]] and [[Berea]].

{{Battle-stub}}
